LowGravity.title: Prefers low gravity
LowGravity.description: Being born and raised on a colony ship, which is where {pawn_name} has spent most of {pawn_possessive} life, means {pawn_possessive} bones and muscles have become accustomed to the artificial gravity commonly found on larger ships. This gravity is relatively weak which means {pawn_name} struggles more than others in high gravity areas.

HighGravity.title: Prefers high gravity
HighGravity.description: Years of living on a planet with a higher than usual amount of gravity has meant {pawn_name} now prefers slightly higher gravity atmospheres.

Gay.title: Gay
Gay.description: {pawn_name} prefers those of the same sex as themselves.

Murderous.title: Murderous
Murderous.description: Has been known to murder others on occasions.

Ugly.title: Ugly
Ugly.description: Not very nice to look at.

PickPocket.title: Pick pocket
PickPocket.description: Has a disregard for a sense of ownership.

Reclusive.title: Reclusive
Reclusive.description: Prefers to avoid the company of others.

Creative.title: Creative
Creative.description: Has a good eye for art and other creative activities.

Fearless.title: Fearless
Fearless.description: Prefers not to back down from a fight.

Coward.title: Coward
Coward.description: Life has taught {pawn_name} to either run from, or actively avoid confrontation or dangerous situations.

LoudSnorer.title: Loud snorer
LoudSnorer.description: Snores extremely loud. Should probably sleep alone.

Jealous.title: Jealous
Jealous.description: Doesn't like others having things better than themselves.

Unhygienic.title: Unhygienic
Unhygienic.description: Doesn't care much for personal hygiene.

NeatFreak.title: Neat freak
NeatFreak.description: Obsessively likes things to be neat and tidy.

Mumbler.title: Mumbler
Mumbler.description: {pawn_name} enjoys mumbling to {pawn_possessive}, though sometimes at the annoyance of others.

Depressive.title: Depressive
Depressive.description: {pawn_name} suffers from a personality disorder which include worthlessness, low self esteem and joylessness.

Chatterbox.title: Chatterbox
Chatterbox.description: {pawn_name} likes to talk a lot, to which some people may find annoying but others may find comforting.

Earther.title: Earther
Earther.description: Prefers living life on a planet.

Spacer.title: Spacer
Spacer.description: Prefers living life in the vastness of space.

Lazy.title: Lazy
Lazy.description: Generally works slower than others and tends to want more sleep.

HardWorker.title: Hard worker
HardWorker.description: Likes to work quicker than others.

Nervous.title: Nervous
Nervous.description: Has a tendency to to let {pawn_possessive} nerves get in the way, often causing undesired outcomes.

Tinkerer.title: Tinkerer
Tinkerer.description: For better or worse {pawn_pronoun} likes to tinker with things.

Greedy.title: Greedy
Greedy.description: Always wants more than everyone else.

Creepy.title: Creepy
Creepy.description: Makes others around them feel nervous.
